title: Infection Overdrive
description: Survive The Overdrive, Kill The Infection
body:
![Infection Overdrive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ff89f096abf1a23047dfe5932ee3aedb19359ef.png)

##  _A Zombie Apocalypse Modpack_

Welcome to a world where every shadow hides a threat, and every decision could mean the difference between life and death. Infection Overdrive isn't just another modpack; it's your ultimate test of survival. Gather your gear, rally your allies, and dive headfirst into an endless struggle against the relentless undead hordes.

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50a817eaa84cd4be599355326e154713054f9d6f.png)

Da Discord: https://discord.gg/jEXg2PcEd5

**Survive The Overdrive ☢️**

Craft powerful weapons, build impenetrable fortresses, and master the art of survival as you outsmart waves of the undead. This is more than just fighting; it’s about using your wits to stay one step ahead of the infection consuming everything in its path.

**Conquer the Challenges ⛹️**

Face off against mutated monsters and explore treacherous landscapes filled with hidden dangers. Discover new biomes, gather essential resources, and unlock special abilities that will give you the edge against the darkness. Will you be the last beacon of hope, or will you fall to the chaos?

**Team Up or Go Solo 💀**

Join forces with friends or brave the apocalypse alone. Cuz this mod is multiplayer-friendly, create alliances, trade resources, or engage in epic PvP battles. Every player brings a unique strength to the fight - are you ready to collaborate, strategize, and claim victory?

**A New Era of Exploration 🌍**
 
Uncover secrets within abandoned cities and eerie wastelands. Each corner you turn reveals new loot opportunities and terrifying foes. The world is yours to explore, but beware—danger lurks everywhere, waiting to catch you off guard.

**Level Up Your Gameplay 🚀**

With new skills, unique perks, and powerful upgrades, you'll have everything you need to evolve beyond your limits. Adapt your strategy as new threats emerge from the darkness.

Infection Overdrive is more than a modpack—it's an adrenaline-pumping journey through a post-apocalyptic nightmare where only the cunning will thrive. Are you ready to face the infection head-on? Gear up, stay sharp, and prepare to fight.

**What this Modpack adds:**

1. Guns, Loot
2. Abandoned Cities
3. Lots of Zawmbezz
_Also, I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THESE MODS. They belong to their respective owners._

**This is my fifth take on creating a modpack, so enjoy what I cooked up in the back of my brain!**

> "HOLY CRAP THERE EVERYWHERE" -The Great Epic face
